reason: Default-off invariant, submit-only run_app, ServiceWizard-only NarrativeService resolution, and render idempotency/anchoring/bounded-meta/precedence all verified by reading the diff and independently re-running tests; 23/23 new tests pass and the full-suite failure/error set (47 failed, 4 errors) is byte-identical to a fresh main-baseline worktree, so no regressions were introduced. Fixed two trivial ruff lint issues (unused pytest import, import sort) in the new test file on this branch.

criteria.criterion: record_narrative_provenance default False, byte-for-byte unchanged default path
criteria.evidence: runner.py: resolve_narrative/handle_meta mutation gated entirely behind `if record_narrative_provenance:`; default branch reuses the exact pre-existing `meta or {}` value; test_default_off_never_resolves_narrative asserts ws.resolve_narrative never called and narrative_id is None

criteria.criterion: run_app submit-only; render only via audit_callback + JobMonitor.wait_all on terminal report
criteria.evidence: monitor.py untouched; wait_all only invokes on_progress on terminal transitions (state already 'completed'/'error'); audit_callback is a separate seam, not called from run_app

criteria.criterion: no import of / dependency on narrative-connector
criteria.evidence: grep shows nc referenced only in comments/docstrings, no imports

kbase_endpoints.py has zero diff; NarrativeServiceClient uses BaseClient(lookup_url=True) against the existing service_wizard suffix, matching the real dynamic-service lookup mechanism used elsewhere in baseclient.py

criteria.criterion: append_app_run_audit idempotent: strip-tagged-cells + rerender from SQLite jobs table, intro/user cells preserved, job_id anchor
criteria.evidence: kb_narrative_audit.py is_audit_cell/render_audit_cells + append_app_run_audit's intro=cells[0:1], others=[non-audit cells]; test_render_idempotent_no_duplicates and test_intro_and_user_cells_preserved_anchor_resolves pass

criteria.criterion: Navigator meta recompute, data_dependencies under 900-byte cap
criteria.evidence: compute_narrative_meta + _bounded_data_dependencies budget math (900 - key_len - 40); test_data_dependencies_bounded_under_900_bytes seeds 200 UPAs and passes

criteria.criterion: resolution precedence explicit-ref > discover-existing > auto-create; exactly one create_new_narrative on bare-ws path; JobRecord.narrative_id stamped at submit
criteria.evidence: resolve_narrative() implements the precedence directly; TestNarrativeResolutionPrecedence covers all branches; test_opt_in_resolves_and_stamps_narrative_id confirms JobRecord.narrative_id set before any wait/render
identical fix applied to both KBWSUtils and KBWSUtilsImpl; loop still terminates correctly on empty page since len(output) < 5000 still sets done=True

criteria.criterion: create_new_narrative always mints a fresh workspace, documented limitation (developer-flagged judgment call)
criteria.evidence: honestly documented in docstring/work-record as a real NarrativeService API constraint mirroring nc's own behavior; does not affect default or explicit-ref/discover paths

criteria.criterion: new tests cover render idempotency, anchor/preservation, bounded meta, resolution precedence, callback wiring
criteria.evidence: 23 tests across TestAppendAppRunAuditRender, TestBoundedNavigatorMeta, TestNarrativeResolutionPrecedence, TestRunAppNarrativeSubmitTime, TestAuditCallback; all pass

tests_run.cmd: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/kb_app_runner/test_kb_app_runner.py tests/test_kb_ws_utils.py tests/test_kb_job_utils.py tests/kb_job_utils/ -q
tests_run.outcome: 159 passed, 2 failed (pre-existing caplog issue, confirmed identical on main baseline), 2 skipped

tests_run.cmd: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q --continue-on-collection-errors --ignore=tests/notebook/helpers --ignore=tests/test_escher_utils.py (branch vs fresh /tmp main worktree)
tests_run.outcome: branch: 47 failed, 1897 passed, 99 skipped, 4 errors; main baseline: 47 failed, 1861 passed, 112 skipped, 4 errors; FAILED/ERROR line sets are byte-identical between the two runs (diff empty); passed/skipped delta fully explained by +23 new tests plus a path-relative sibling-repo skip artifact (test_kb_annotation_utils_parquet.py skips depend on a relative sibling clone that resolves differently at /tmp vs ~/.maestro/worktrees)

tests_run.cmd: ruff check src/kbutillib/kb_app_runner/runner.py src/kbutillib/kb_ws_utils.py src/kbutillib/kb_narrative_audit.py src/kbutillib/installed_clients/NarrativeServiceClient.py src/kbutillib/kb_job_utils/store.py src/kbutillib/kb_job_utils/utils.py tests/test_kb_narrative_provenance.py
tests_run.outcome: 2 pre-existing F401 (confirmed present on main baseline, unrelated to this diff) + 2 issues in the new test file, both fixed on this branch (commit e3b0806)
